name: Taiwanese 16 Spice Black Pork Ribs
ingredients: 18 g Michiu Rice Wine or Shaoxing if don't have
steps: Mix the Dry Ingredients together so that it blends all nicely.
Combine the wet ingredients with the dried ingredients
Add the Baby Ribs to the Marinade
Let it marinate for 4 hours to Overnight
Coat it in the Corn Flour before frying it
Pre fry the ribs at 160C for 6 Min
Let it cool and when one is in order Refry it until Golden and Hot at 180C approx 2-3 min depending on Size of the ribs
